summary: Solid Dead show highlighted by Keith’s jam session; recording quality isn’t described but is presumed adequate.
review: Both reviewers rate the performance highly, calling it a good/fantastic show and specifically praising Keith's keyboard jams. No details are given about the source or fidelity of the recording, so while the audio is assumed to be listenable, its technical quality remains undefined.

ai_rating.rationale: Two enthusiastic reviews (4 and 5 stars) focus on the strong performance, especially Keith’s playing; lack of recording details limits certainty but overall impression is very positive.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on sound quality, drop‑outs, or mix; absence of criticism suggests the recording is at least acceptable for listening.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviews describe the concert as a good/fantastic performance with no noted pacing problems.
